signals.headline: CLARITY Act Clears Hurdle, Classifying XRP as Digital Commodity | YES | MED confidence**
signals.raw:
CLARITY Act Clears Hurdle, Classifying XRP as Digital Commodity | YES | MED confidence**  
The bill advanced past a key legislative step, targeting late-April Senate Banking Committee markup and mid-2026 floor vote, enabling banks/asset managers to scale XRP exposure; Galaxy's Alex Thorn notes April as critical, with XRP leading ETF inflows ($119.6M weekly, $3.3M on April 12).[5][3]

signals.headline: SOUTH KOREA INFLATION RISES TO 2
signals.raw:
SOUTH KOREA INFLATION RISES TO 2.2% IN MARCH 2026, UP FROM 2.0% IN PRIOR MONTHS | NO | MED confidence**

South Korea's annual inflation rate increased to 2.2% in March 2026 from 2.0% in January and February, remaining below market forecasts of 2.4% but exceeding the Bank of Korea's 2.0% target amid oil price pressures from Middle East tensions.[3] The Bank of Korea held its benchmark rate at 2.5%
